title: Lightning Encrypted and Authenticated Transport
description: How Lightning peers use the Noise_XK handshake and elliptic-curve Diffie–Hellman to authenticate node identities, derive session keys, and protect framed messages with authenticated encryption.

resources.title: BOLT 08: Encrypted and Authenticated Transport
resources.notes: Canonical Lightning transport specification covering Noise_XK, key derivation, ChaCha20-Poly1305, and framed message protection.

resources.title: The Noise Protocol Framework
resources.notes: Reference for the handshake patterns and authenticated key exchange model used by BOLT 08.

resources.title: Mastering the Lightning Network
resources.notes: Broader context for Lightning peer connections and protocol security.
